extensionDescription.message: Record only the time you tap after taking a dose. Names, dose amounts, and effects are not stored.

purposeText.message: Records only the time you tap the button in Chrome storage on this device. Names, dose amounts, and effects are not stored.

tapButtonDescription.message: Save the current time as one record.

onboardingGuideCopy.message: For your first record, tap "$BUTTON$" once right after taking a dose. Only the time is saved.

onboardingGuideAction.message: Next step: tap the large "$BUTTON$" button once.

onboardingGuideResult.message: After that, the time appears in Latest record and Recent records.

emptyLatestRecord.message: No records yet. Your first saved time will appear here.

emptyHistoryRecords.message: No history yet. After your first record is saved, up to $COUNT$ recent times will appear here.

clearButtonDescription.message: Deletes all records saved on this device.

confirmClear.message: Delete all records saved on this device? This cannot be undone.

firstRunGuide.message: To start, tap the large "$BUTTON$" button.

privacyNote.message: No data leaves this extension. Records are stored only in Chrome storage on this device.

premiumCopy.message: Premium is a one-time purchase ($PRICE$) with a $DAYS$ trial. Recording still works without Premium.

storageError.message: Could not read or write saved records.
